widget.title: Oak catch list — before the Elite Four (174 cumulative)

rows.label: Ponyta → Rapidash (L40)
rows.note: Route 27 grass, morning/day — more common on Route 26

rows.label: Rhyhorn → Rhydon (L42)
rows.note: Victory Road, morning/day — or hunt the 5% wild RHYDON directly

rows.label: Master Ball banked (Elm, 8 badges)
rows.note: Hold it — the no-Master-Ball achievements want it unused; the Oak guide spends it on Lugia OR Ho-Oh
